nodes.label: API Design Principles Skill
nodes.rationale: Master REST and GraphQL API design principles to build intuitive, scalable, maintainable APIs for developers.

nodes.label: Resource-Oriented Architecture
nodes.rationale: Resources are nouns not verbs; HTTP methods express actions; URLs represent hierarchies with consistent naming.

nodes.label: GraphQL Schema-First Development
nodes.rationale: Types define domain model; queries read, mutations modify, subscriptions push real-time updates; single typed endpoint with introspection.

nodes.label: DataLoader N+1 Prevention
nodes.rationale: Batch-load related entities in GraphQL resolvers to avoid N+1 query explosions.

nodes.label: Pre-Implementation API Review
nodes.rationale: Structured gate covering resources, HTTP methods, status codes, pagination, auth, rate limits, docs, testing, security, performance, monitoring.

nodes.label: Shallow Nested Resources
nodes.rationale: Prefer shallow nesting (users/{id}/orders); avoid deep URL hierarchies beyond two levels.

nodes.label: Brainstorming Skill
nodes.rationale: Mandatory pre-implementation design process: explore context, ask questions one at a time, propose approaches, present design, write spec, then invoke writing-plans.

nodes.label: Implementation Hard Gate
nodes.rationale: No code, scaffolding, or implementation skills until design is presented and user approves — applies to every project regardless of perceived simplicity.

nodes.label: One Question At A Time
nodes.rationale: Ask clarifying questions sequentially to avoid overwhelming the user; prefer multiple-choice when possible.

nodes.label: Design For Isolation And Clarity
nodes.rationale: Break systems into well-bounded units with clear interfaces that can be understood and tested independently.

nodes.label: Writing-Plans Terminal State
nodes.rationale: Brainstorming ends by invoking writing-plans only — never frontend-design or other implementation skills.

nodes.label: HTML Content Fragments
nodes.rationale: Write content fragments by default; server wraps them in frame template unless full HTML document is needed.

nodes.label: Brainstorming Batch Skill
nodes.rationale: Token-efficient variant: same destination as brainstorming but groups questions into dense batches to minimize round-trips.

nodes.label: Question Batching Mechanic
nodes.rationale: Round 1 must be comprehensive; questions grouped by theme, numbered, multiple-choice with defaults and priority tags.

nodes.label: Single Approval Gate
nodes.rationale: Merge propose-approaches and present-design into one message with a single approval gate to save round-trips.

nodes.label: Canvas Design Skill
nodes.rationale: Create museum-quality visual art in PDF/PNG via design philosophy manifestos; original work only, never copy existing artists.

nodes.label: Design Philosophy Creation
nodes.rationale: First create a visual philosophy (aesthetic movement manifesto) emphasizing spatial expression, minimal text, expert craftsmanship.

nodes.label: Subtle Conceptual Reference
nodes.rationale: Embed niche topic reference invisibly into form and color like a jazz quotation — felt by insiders, appreciated abstractly by others.

nodes.label: Expert Craftsmanship Standard
nodes.rationale: Final work must appear meticulously crafted with master-level execution; refine existing composition rather than adding clutter on second pass.

nodes.label: Minimal Text As Visual Accent
nodes.rationale: Information lives in design not paragraphs; text is sparse, essential-only, integrated as visual element.

nodes.label: Canvas Fonts Library
nodes.rationale: OFL-licensed typography resources for canvas-design output; use varied fonts from ./canvas-fonts directory.

nodes.label: App Root Layout
nodes.rationale: Full-height flex column with conditional header/tab-nav and scrollable main content area.

nodes.label: Fullscreen Layout Mode
nodes.rationale: LayoutService.isFullscreen() and isAuthRoute() hide header/tabs and remove padding for projection views.

nodes.label: Auth Card

nodes.label: Four-Phase Systematic Debugging
nodes.rationale: Root cause investigation before fixes; no patches without understanding.

nodes.label: Accessibility-First UX Priority
nodes.rationale: Contrast 4.5:1, keyboard nav, aria-labels are CRITICAL priority in UI/UX skill.

nodes.label: DaisyUI Native Dialog Modal Pattern
nodes.rationale: dialog.modal.modal-open + modal-box + modal-backdrop with aria-modal and keyboard dismiss.

nodes.label: Dashboard List Page Composition Pattern
nodes.rationale: page-header → filter-bar → active-filters/column-toggle → data-table → empty-state → pagination.

nodes.label: FigureSnapshot
nodes.rationale: First assignment triggers snapshot: template FigureNodes become immutable InstanceNodes; subsequent template edits do not affect the instance.

nodes.label: EventAssignmentLock
nodes.rationale: When event assignments are locked, ad-hoc node create/move/delete and assignment edits are read-only.

nodes.label: Context-Aware Attendance Status Mapping
nodes.rationale: Legacy Potser/Vinc/No vinc labels map differently for past vs future events and assaig vs actuacio types.

nodes.label: Refresh Token Rotation with Family Revocation
nodes.rationale: SHA-256 hashed refresh tokens with family pattern detect reuse and revoke entire session on hijack attempt.
nodes.norm_label: refresh token rotation with family revocation

nodes.label: P4.2 Dashboard Events Attendance CRUD Spec
nodes.norm_label: p4.2 dashboard events attendance crud spec

nodes.label: Explicit Two-Level Composition Model
nodes.rationale: FigureTemplate for individual figures; CompositionTemplate arranges multiple templates with relative offsets; never recursive.

nodes.label: Lazy Instance Snapshot on First Assignment
nodes.rationale: FigureInstance references live template nodes until first assignment copies them to immutable InstanceNode rows owned by the instance.
nodes.norm_label: lazy instance snapshot on first assignment

nodes.label: Position Slug Matching to FigureNode positionType
nodes.rationale: Position tags and canvas positionType remain independent fields matched by slug convention for smart assignment filtering.
nodes.norm_label: position slug matching to figurenode positiontype

nodes.label: Rengla
nodes.rationale: Radial line of pinya positions from center outward; each renglaPosition maps to a cordó. Stored as separate entity with FK to FigureTemplate (not free string) for startPosition, allowsCordoObert, sortOrder integrity.

nodes.label: InstanceNode
nodes.rationale: Immutable snapshot copy of FigureNode rows; gains renglaId and renglaPosition copied at snapshot time so cordon filtering works post-snapshot without reading template.

nodes.label: Lazy Snapshot
nodes.rationale: First assignment triggers snapshotInstance transaction copying all FigureNodes to InstanceNodes and setting snapshotted=true. With rengles, snapshot copies ALL cordon nodes (not just active variant), simplifying upgrade to visual filter only.

nodes.label: NodeAssignment
nodes.rationale: Links Person to InstanceNode (never FigureNode post-snapshot). Assignments on hidden cordons persist when numberOfCordons is reduced.

nodes.label: FigureInstance
nodes.rationale: Gains numberOfCordons (visible cordon count) and openCordons (renglaIds with cordó obert active). Replaces variant-based cordon selection.

nodes.label: Ghost Clone
nodes.rationale: Konva ghost node behind each pinya node for radial clone; auto-assigns renglaId and renglaPosition+1. Implemented in Konva not SVG overlay (D3).

nodes.label: Cordó Obert
nodes.rationale: Optional per-rengla position at renglaPosition=MAX+1; visibility controlled by FigureInstance.openCordons array and positionType cordo-obert.

nodes.label: isAdHoc
nodes.rationale: Boolean discriminator on InstanceNode; true for user-created post-snapshot nodes with sourceNodeId=null. Relaxes snapshot immutability in controlled way — existing snapshot nodes remain read-only.

nodes.label: InstanceNode
nodes.rationale: Single-table extension: isAdHoc boolean + createdBy FK. Ad-hoc nodes have renglaId=null, independent of rengla system. DECORATION zone for spatial elements replacing ReferenceElement.

nodes.label: Lazy Snapshot
nodes.rationale: Auto-snapshot on first ad-hoc creation if snapshotted=false — same transaction as assign() pattern. isAdHoc=true rows only exist when snapshotted=true.

nodes.label: NodeAssignment
nodes.rationale: assign() rejects DECORATION zone nodes with 400. Ad-hoc PINYA and direction nodes are assignable like snapshot nodes.

nodes.label: FigureZone.DECORATION
nodes.rationale: Non-assignable spatial/orientation element; replaces removed P5.8.1 ReferenceElement scoped to instance level.

nodes.label: ReferenceElement
nodes.rationale: Removed P5.8.1 event-scoped module; superseded by instance-scoped DECORATION ad-hoc nodes.

nodes.label: Bulk Import Ad-Hoc Cloning
nodes.rationale: After template-node matching, clones all isAdHoc=true InstanceNodes from source with new UUIDs and assignments; returns clonedAdHocNodes count.

nodes.label: AssignmentStateService
nodes.rationale: Signals: isPlacementMode, placementPreset, adHocNodes computed. Methods createAdHocNode, updateAdHocNode, deleteAdHocNode with optimistic pendingOperations pattern.

nodes.label: Ad-Hoc Cordó Obert Simplification
nodes.rationale: Ad-hoc cordo-obert nodes have renglaId=null, always visible, not subject to openCordons filter. Coexists with rengla-based template cordons oberts.

nodes.label: Season Entity
nodes.rationale: Hard delete (not soft); overlap validation via daterange; cannot delete if events exist (409).

nodes.label: SeasonService
nodes.rationale: CRUD methods create/update/remove plus findCurrent by date range with fallback to most recent startDate.

nodes.label: Event Season Auto-Assignment
nodes.rationale: EventService.create/update calls SeasonService.findCurrent() when seasonId undefined; null explicitly disassociates.

nodes.label: SeasonListComponent
nodes.rationale: Dashboard route /config/seasons; simple DaisyUI table with Actual badge, modal form, hard delete with 409 toast.

nodes.label: Ad-Hoc Node CRUD Endpoints
nodes.rationale: POST/PATCH/DELETE /figure-instances/:id/ad-hoc-nodes in NodeAssignmentService; auto-snapshot in createAdHocNode transaction; zone whitelist PINYA only in Phase 1.

nodes.label: ad-hoc-node.constants.ts
nodes.rationale: PINYA_POSITION_TYPES, AD_HOC_PINYA_PRESETS, InstanceNodeItem.isAdHoc in libs/shared exported via @muixer/shared.

nodes.label: AD_HOC_DECORATION_PRESETS
nodes.rationale: Rectangle, arrow, circle DECORATION presets; zone whitelist extended to PINYA+DECORATION; Konva ARROW/CIRCLE rendering.

nodes.label: AD_HOC_DIRECTION_PRESETS
nodes.rationale: FIGURE_DIRECTION and XICALLA_DIRECTION assignable ad-hoc nodes; split FAB; swap fix; RECTANGLE shape for directions.

nodes.label: Phase 4 UX Polish
nodes.rationale: No DB migration; help modal enhancement, Ctrl+D duplication, Ctrl+1..9 keyboard shortcuts, template editor awareness banner, Phase 3 gap fixes.

nodes.label: UndoRedoService
nodes.rationale: In-memory undo/redo stack for ad-hoc operations; max ~50 actions; cleared on tab/instance change. Deferred from Phase 4.

nodes.label: Save As Template Preset
nodes.rationale: Promote ad-hoc nodes back to FigureNode template; requires figure_nodes_zone_enum migration; architecturally significant deferred feature.

nodes.label: @muixer/shared Library
nodes.rationale: Nx-generated shared library for enums, interfaces, constants imported by api/dashboard/pwa. Build via nx build shared; tests via nx test shared.
